messages: Got any clever life hacks for organizing a very small kitchen so counter space feels less cluttered?
Tell me an interesting, little-known tidbit about octopuses—the stranger the better.
Given that my workday now starts earlier and my mornings have fewer spare minutes, would you recommend moving my regular jog to later in the day or trying to keep it as a morning ritual?

I also mentioned having a couple of recurring evening obligations and an early-week presentation to prep—would it make more sense to shift prep earlier in the week or to break it into short sessions each morning?
Since my commute has noticeably increased, should I prioritize cutting travel time, compressing the morning routine, or rearranging evening commitments to reduce weekday stress?

If we wanted one minimal change that preserves sleep and reduces weekday pressure, would you first suggest negotiating a later desk arrival, shifting exercise to different days, or compressing nonessential morning tasks?
